sections.sectionTitle: Bildad in, “Pasian' Muhna-ah Mihing Dikzo Ngeilo Ding,” Ci

verses.text: Tua ciangin Shuah gammi Bildad in dawng a
“Pasian vanglian a, mi khempeuh in a zahtak ding ahi hi. Ama vantung kumpi gam, nuamtakin a omsakzo hi
Ama na a sem vantung mite bangzah pha cih kua in simzo ding ahi hiam? Pasian' khuavak in a batlohna koi lai mun om ahi hiam
Pasian' muhna-ah kua dikzo ding a, siangthozo ding ahi hiam
Ama mitah khapi nangawn taang sa zolo lai a, aksite nangawn siang sa zolo lai hi
Tua ahih leh, lungno, ganhing no ahi lel mihing pen bangci ding ahi hiam? Mihing in Pasian' muhna-ah bang man lel ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
